Title: US-08: Gaze Intent Overlay
Body: As a developer, I want to capture and overlay gaze intent on the live video stream to visually verify tracking accuracy.

Title: US-09: Cloud Viewer Application
Body: As a reviewer, I want a graphical interface (Viewer App) that stores and pulls data and images to/from the cloud so I can easily review the captures without a local instance.

Title: US-03b: Search and Filter Log Database
Body: As a user, I want to search and filter the log database so I can isolate relevant data from specific runs.

Title: US-03a: Database Setup
Body: As a user, I want to set up a database for the snapshots and metadata to be stored securely.
